title: Capped
description: A small currency mod for your servers and roleplay servers!
body:
**This Description is for the New Version 1.20.1:**

Capped is a small. Very small mod that adds Caps and Cola Bottles to the game. You can obtain these caps via cap caches. As well as consuming Cola bottles. Cola Bottles give you a speed boost.

There may be content updates and tweaks to how to obtain caps and how the system works.

How the Current System Works:

**Caps:**
There are Red Caps, Nitro Caps, and Void Caps. Each being of value being.

**Nitro Caps** = 128 **Red Caps**
**Void Caps** = 128 **Nitro Caps**

You can get these caps from **Cola Co. Caches** that you find underground or you can craft them manually.

When breaking **Cola Crates** you have a chance to get **Nitro Caps** from them as well as a number of your usual Red Caps.

You can also make your own soda by smelting and combining certain ingredients. (recipes below if you don't have JEI)

Villagers such as **Toolsmith, Cleric, and Wandering Trader.** Now have bottlecap trades.

**Toolsmith:** is a way to obtain caps.
**Cleric:** is a way to convert caps.
**Wandering Trader:** is a way to use caps.

These trades are not guaranteed but are on the Novice level so you can reset the trades until you get the desired trade.

**Crafting Recipes**

![Cola Crate Recipe](https://i.ibb.co/z5r8GWC/Crate-Recipe.png)

![Trapped Glass Bottle](https://i.ibb.co/1dR6SxP/Trappedbottlerecipe.png)

![Void Cola Recipe](https://i.ibb.co/HPN2rNP/Void-Cola-Recipe.png)

![Red Cola Bottle](https://i.ibb.co/1f1TmWj/Cola-Recipe.png)

![Nitro Cola Bottle](https://i.ibb.co/T2mdHGw/Nitrocola-Recipe.png)

![Ender Puree](https://i.ibb.co/s3xvFtN/enderpuree-Recipe.png)

**1.20.1 Version Only:**

Villagers have Cola Cap Trades

New Textures

Nitro Cola Effects

Ender Puree

A new coat of paint for easter egg

Source Code Added to page (I think)

**(This will not be backported)**



**Any Issues or Suggestions? Send them here!**
